name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V8.2 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 54 skills, 31 agents, 42 MCP tools, 31 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, experience-quality panels, invocation telemetry gates, goal contracts, live Mission Control dashboard, fingerprinted gap ledger, and dual-runtime install.
compatibility_notes: V8.2 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Codex native slash commands are not plugin-routed; use $ultraprompt:<skill>, natural language, or MCP tools for plugin operations.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
